accountSid.label: Twilio Subaccount SID
accountSid.help: The per-env subaccount Account SID (not the master account).

apiKeySid.label: API Key SID
apiKeySid.help: Scoped Standard API Key SID used for REST send auth.

apiKeySecret.label: API Key Secret
apiKeySecret.help: Paired with the API Key SID for REST basic-auth. Never the master Auth Token.

authToken.label: Subaccount Auth Token
authToken.help: Used ONLY as the X-Twilio-Signature HMAC key for inbound webhook validation.

inbound.label: Inbound Policy
inbound.help: pairing (default, deny-by-default → connect CTA), allowlist, or disabled.
